80.2 - Transportation 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125.B, HHA-230.B 

The transportation of a patient, whether to receive covered care or for other purposes, is 
excluded from home health coverage. Costs of transportation of equipment, materials, 
supplies, or staff may be allowable as administrative costs, but no separate
